description: Kopia HTTP server started without a password exposes UI endpoints, including /api/v1/repo/exists. The handler forwards attacker-controlled SFTP storage configuration into blob.NewStorage; externalSSH with sshArguments containing -oProxyCommand can execute commands through OpenSSH.

vulns.description: When server username/password are not configured, getAuthenticator returns nil and requireUIUser authorizes UI endpoints without credentials.
SFTP externalSSH mode appends SSHArguments from user-supplied storage config into ssh command arguments without allowlisting dangerous options such as ProxyCommand.
The repo exists endpoint accepts attacker-controlled storage configuration and reaches blob.NewStorage, triggering SFTP backend initialization.
